request.description: These `params` control how the **Yelp Search Export** crawler behaves — including result limits and optional contact harvesting. ➡️ These parameters are specific to the **Yelp Search Export** crawler. _Refer to the_ [Constructing the params Object](#13eb068f-2bae-4603-941e-9f36038fb379) _section to understand how to format and apply them._ | Parameter | Type | Description | | --- | --- | --- | | **max_results** | integer | Maximum number of businesses to collect before stopping (e.g., `240`). | | **collect_contacts** | boolean | If `true`, visits each business’s website to extract email addresses and social media links, if available. | --- ### ⚠️ **Additional Notes** - Enabling **collect_contacts** adds extra HTTP requests per business, increasing total run time.

response.name: Example

request.description:
These `result` objects are returned by the **Yelp Search Export** crawler.

| **Field** | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| **address** | string | Business address as listed on Yelp. |
| **amenities** | string | Comma-separated amenities offered (e.g., “Accepts Credit Cards”). |
| **categories** | string | Comma-separated business categories (e.g., “Flooring, Carpet Installation, Tiling”). |
| **email** | string or null | Collected email address if `collect_contacts` was enabled and found. |
| **functions** | object or null | Reserved for function-specific metadata (currently `null`). |
| **is_claimed** | boolean | `true` if the business profile is claimed by its owner. |
| **is_closed** | boolean | `true` if the business is permanently closed. |
| **lat** | number or null | Latitude coordinate of the business location, if available. |
| **lng** | number or null | Longitude coordinate of the business location, if available. |
| **name** | string | Name of the business. |
| **native_id** | integer | Yelp’s internal numeric ID for the business. |
| **phone** | string | Business phone number, if listed. |
| **price** | string | Price range indicator (e.g., “$”, “$$”, “$$$”). |
| **reviews** | integer | Total number of reviews the business has received. |
| **score** | number | Average star rating (1.0–5.0). |
| **scraping_time** | string (ISO) | Timestamp when this result was fetched (e.g. `"2025-04-07T06:56:02.016Z"`). |
| **url** | string | Direct Yelp URL to the business listing. |
| **website** | string | Business website URL, if provided. |
| **website_menu** | string | URL to the business’s menu page, if listed on Yelp. |
| **yelp_menu** | string or null | URL to the Yelp-hosted menu section, if available. |

response.name: Example
response.body:
